name: The Rusher
description: Impatient user who clicks fast, skips steps, doesn't read dialogs
behavior: Click rapidly, don't wait for loading, skip confirmation dialogs, use keyboard shortcuts aggressively, never read error messages, immediately dismiss popups

name: The Hacker
description: Malicious user trying to break the app with injections and exploits
behavior: Try SQL injection in every text field, XSS payloads, path traversal strings, buffer overflow attempts with extremely long strings, try to access hidden menus, right-click everything, look for debug modes

name: Grandma
description: Elderly user who is confused by technology, clicks wrong things
behavior: Click slowly, misclick often, click labels instead of buttons, try to double-click everything, get confused by navigation, hit back button repeatedly, accidentally trigger right-click menus, type very slowly with mistakes

name: The Edge Lord
description: User who inputs the weirdest possible data
behavior: Enter unicode, emoji, RTL text, zalgo text, null bytes, extremely long strings (10000+ chars), HTML tags, empty strings, only whitespace, negative numbers where positive expected, dates from year 9999

name: The Accessibility User
description: User who relies entirely on keyboard navigation and screen readers
behavior: Never use mouse, only Tab/Shift-Tab to navigate, Enter to activate, arrow keys for lists, check that every element is reachable via keyboard, verify focus indicators are visible, test with VoiceOver enabled

name: The Rage Clicker
description: Frustrated user who spam-clicks and aggressively interacts
behavior: Click the same button 20 times rapidly, click during loading screens, force quit and reopen, resize window aggressively, minimize and maximize rapidly, drag things to wrong places, undo/redo spam

name: The Methodical Tester
description: Systematic user who tries every combination thoroughly
behavior: Try every menu item in order, fill every form field, test every dropdown option, check every checkbox combination, verify every link, test boundary values in numeric fields, test all keyboard shortcuts listed in menus

name: The Multitasker
description: User who constantly switches between apps and tabs
behavior: Cmd-Tab away mid-operation, switch focus to other windows, come back and expect state preserved, copy-paste from other apps, drag files from Finder into the app, trigger Spotlight mid-flow

name: The Minimalist
description: User who does the absolute bare minimum interaction
behavior: Leave every optional field blank, skip all optional steps, use only default settings, never customize, submit forms with minimum required data, never explore beyond the happy path

name: The Power User
description: Expert user who uses every shortcut and hidden feature
behavior: Use every keyboard shortcut, right-click context menus, drag and drop everywhere, use modifier keys (Cmd, Option, Shift) with clicks, try hidden preferences, use terminal commands if available, chain complex workflows

name: The Localization Tester
description: User testing with non-English locales and input methods
behavior: Switch system language mid-session, input CJK characters, use right-to-left text, test with different date/number formats, use accented characters in every field, test with different keyboard layouts

name: The Offline User
description: User who loses network connectivity at the worst times
behavior: Disable network mid-operation, try to use online features offline, toggle airplane mode, submit forms during network drops, expect graceful offline fallbacks, reconnect and expect sync

name: The Screen Reader User
description: Blind user navigating entirely via VoiceOver
behavior: Navigate with VO+arrow keys, interact with VO+Space, read element descriptions, check rotor navigation, verify all images have alt text, ensure modal dialogs trap focus, test landmark navigation

name: The Data Hoarder
description: User who creates massive amounts of data to stress test limits
behavior: Create hundreds of items, import massive files, fill storage to near-capacity, create deeply nested folder structures, duplicate items repeatedly, never delete anything, test with 10000+ list items

name: The Undo Addict
description: User who constantly undoes and redoes actions
behavior: Cmd-Z after every action, redo then undo again, undo past the beginning of history, make changes then undo all of them, test undo across different operation types, undo during saves

name: The Window Resizer
description: User who constantly resizes and repositions the app window
behavior: Drag window to minimum size, maximize then restore, move between monitors, use Split View, resize during operations, check layout at every breakpoint, full-screen toggle rapidly

name: The Copy-Paster
description: User who pastes unexpected content from clipboard into every field
behavior: Paste images into text fields, paste rich text with formatting, paste file paths, paste extremely long clipboard content, paste binary data, paste from password managers, paste multi-line text into single-line fields
